story: Imprisoned D. Rowe seduces Cassidy through letters, praising her hunger and asking for photographs. She invites him to meet at a lake one week after his release, wearing a locket. In the days before the meeting, an older woman uses Cassidy’s locket and plans to wait at the dock as a trap for Rowe. Released, Rowe spends the week rehearsing how he will control and terrorize Cassidy. At dusk he enters the forest and approaches the misty lake.
implausible_knowledge: In the days before the meeting, an older woman uses Cassidy’s locket and plans to wait at the dock as a trap for Rowe.
question: When Rowe sees someone waiting at the dock, what will he most plausibly do?
answer_with_knowledge: Keep his distance and try to leave the lake instead of approaching.
answer_without_knowledge: Walk toward the figure at the dock, expecting it to be Cassidy.
